prerequisites: A Jotform API key, created from My Account > API by selecting "Create a new API Key".

Knowledge of which Jotform API endpoint your account uses (standard https://api.jotform.com, EU https://eu-api.jotform.com, or HIPAA https://hipaa-api.jotform.com), to set the api_endpoint config field.
A start_date and end_date defining the replication window for the sync.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single Jotform API key supplied in the api_key secret field. Jotform accepts the key either as an apiKey query parameter or as an APIKEY HTTP header; the connector handles transmitting it. Create the key in your Jotform account under My Account > API.

setupSteps.title: Create a Jotform API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Jotform, go to My Account, open the API section, and create a new API key. Copy the generated key for use in the connector's api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Select your API endpoint
setupSteps.body: Set the api_endpoint config field to the base URL matching your account: https://api.jotform.com for standard accounts, https://eu-api.jotform.com for EU, or https://hipaa-api.jotform.com for HIPAA.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and replication window
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key in the api_key field, and set the required start_date and end_date fields to define the date range of data to replicate.

sources.title: Jotform API documentation (Authentication and Getting Started)
How to Create a Jotform API Key
